description: Lock Guild Apprentice Contracts to enforceable written apprenticeship agreements, not post-training guild certification seals.

checks.reason: The node remains grounded in structured craft apprenticeship practice.
The scoped source is a written witnessed legal agreement preserved as a medieval document.
The source-backed agreement uses promises, pledges, breach terms, and legal renunciations.
Contract law enables the apprentice text as an enforceable agreement, but the specific craft training system remains separately represented.
Guild seals attest certification, quality, or rights; they should not be restored as a direct prerequisite for creating apprentice contracts.
The node stays anchored to the dated Marseilles barber apprenticeship agreement.
